Title: GAJ-STRIPE-001 - Checkout completed event awards purchased credits
Preconditions: Valid Stripe checkout.session.completed event fixture exists.
Steps:
1. Process valid checkout completed event.
2. Review Stripe event handling result.
3. Review credit ledger entries.
Expected Result: Purchased credits are awarded once with a purchase_stripe ledger reason/ref.

Title: GAJ-STRIPE-002 - Duplicate Stripe event does not double-award credits
Preconditions: Same Stripe event can be processed twice.
Steps:
1. Process Stripe event once.
2. Process same Stripe event again.
3. Review ledger entries.
Expected Result: Duplicate event is ignored/idempotent and credits are not double-awarded.

Title: GAJ-STRIPE-003 - Invalid signature is rejected
Preconditions: Webhook request with invalid signature is available.
Steps:
1. Submit webhook with invalid signature.
2. Review response.
3. Review ledger state.
Expected Result: Webhook is rejected and no credits are awarded.

Title: GAJ-STRIPE-004 - Unknown event type is handled safely
Steps:
1. Process unknown Stripe event type.
2. Review response/log behavior.
3. Review ledger state.
Expected Result: Event is safely ignored or acknowledged without creating credits.

Title: GAJ-STRIPE-005 - Database failure does not mark credit award successful
Preconditions: Database write failure can be simulated.
Steps:
1. Process valid payment event while ledger write fails.
2. Review response/error handling.
3. Retry after DB recovery if applicable.
Expected Result: Failure does not create false success state and can be retried safely.
